# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "1.1"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.example.com
  routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
    - /service1/*
  plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      hour: 500
  - name: request-size-limiting
    config:
      size: "10k"
      client_max_body_size: "8m"
      
- name: service2
  url: http://service2.example.com
  routes:
  - name: route2
    paths:
    - /service2/*
  plugins:
  - name: jwt-auth
    config:
      anonymous: "~*"
